name: pspec
description: pspec (picospec) is the smallest specification toolkit for solo developers and AI agents

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc && mkdir -p dist/templates/prompts dist/templates/agents && cp src/templates/prompts/*.md dist/templates/prompts/ && cp src/templates/agents/*.yaml dist/templates/agents/ && node dist/transform-agents.js dist/templates/agents dist/agents

author: rzkmak
